top_signals.title: Some Buyer Fatigue Credit: Matt Brill
top_signals.summary: Matt Brill, head of North American investment grade credit at Invesco, joins Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss high-grade credit, inflation's impact on fixed income, and the Invesco Total Return Bond ETF (Ticker: GTO).  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
